chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett No.D-1427 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.5552/2025 (Ex/A) 3. For hearing of main case 22.09.2025 Mr. Mansoor Hussain Halepoto, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General ************** 1. Deferred for the time being 2. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the present Constitution Petition and submits that the petitioner intends to file a fresh petition after curing the legal defects. Under these circumstances, the present Constitution Petition, stands dismissed as not pressed along with the listed application(s). However, the petitioner is at liberty to file a fresh petition, if so advised. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
